eval_dimensions.name: Current State Detection
eval_dimensions.description: Locates existing tokens (arg, keyring, env) and config before prompting

eval_dimensions.name: auth.test Validation
eval_dimensions.description: Calls auth.test on any located token and short-circuits setup when ok:true; falls through on invalid_auth/token_revoked

eval_dimensions.name: Keyring Auto-Detection
eval_dimensions.description: Detects running keyring backend (secret-tool + gnome-keyring-daemon/kwalletd on Linux, security on macOS) and defaults to keyring without prompting

eval_dimensions.name: Config Field Derivation
eval_dimensions.description: Derives bot_username/bot_user_id/team_id from auth.test, self_user_id from users.lookupByEmail, defaults user_groups to {} — only prompts on derivation failure

eval_dimensions.name: Prompt Minimization
eval_dimensions.description: Prompts only fire when discovery genuinely fails; pre-configured users see zero AskUserQuestion calls

evals.name: preconfigured-token-keyring
evals.description: Token already in keyring, daemon running, config absent. Should auto-validate, derive fields, write config — zero AskUserQuestion calls.

assertions.signal: curl POST to slack.com/api/auth.test fires after locating the token
Zero AskUserQuestion calls when keyring token is valid and fields are derivable
Final state report mentions successful auth.test result

evals.name: token-via-argument
evals.description: Token passed as argument. Should validate via auth.test and skip the token-source prompt.

assertions.signal: auth.test fires against the argument token
No 'token source' AskUserQuestion when token is passed as arg

evals.name: fresh-setup-no-token
evals.description: No token in keyring, env, or args. Should prompt for token source — but not for storage method when keyring daemon is running.

assertions.signal: command -v secret-tool / pgrep keyring-daemon runs to auto-detect storage

evals.name: invalid-token-fallthrough
evals.description: Stale token in keyring returns invalid_auth. Should discard token, report diagnostic, fall through to Step 2.

assertions.signal: Diagnostic line reports the auth.test error code
Step 2 token-source prompt fires after invalid token is discarded

evals.name: self-user-id-derivation
evals.description: After auth.test ok, derives self_user_id via users.lookupByEmail using git user.email — without prompting.

assertions.signal: curl to users.lookupByEmail fires with git config user.email value
self_user_id is not prompted when lookup succeeds
